title: eleocharis uniglumis
intro: Eleocharis uniglumis, also known as spike-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis uniglumis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
